title: REQUEST: Hide MultiSSH text
author: DinamoXP
body_snippet:
Hi,

MultiSSH text is visible as plain text and there is no protection when sending sensitive information (passwords).
My request is to have a check box that when enabled, it will hide the text and text will not be saved in recent commands list.

Thanks

![req](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/97408535/148699411-a19489b8-f220-4523-9476-2286cc60388a.jpg)

iterations.description: To provide a global setting for users to hide all MultiSSH related UI elements, improving UI customization.
Bulk verified: commit ebccb513 exists (MEDIUM confidence)

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `ebccb513` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** REQUEST: Hide MultiSSH text

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): To provide a global setting for users to hide all MultiSSH related UI elements, improving UI customization.
Approach: Implement a new application setting to control the overall visibility of MultiSSH UI elements (toolbar, view menu item, and connection context menu items). This will involve adding a setting, a corresponding option in the UI, and integrating this setting into the logic that controls the visibility of the MultiSSH toolbar and menu items.
